name: Almond Persimmon Pudding
recipeIngredient: Bottled hard sauce - OR - Whipped cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour with baking soda, salt, and cinnamon.
2. Beat eggs until light.
3. Add sugar to the beaten eggs and beat until combined.
4. Stir in persimmon pulp and melted butter.
5. Gradually add flour mixture and milk alternately, beating until smooth.
6. Fold in raisins and chopped almonds.
7. Pour batter into a well-greased 9 x 5-inch loaf pan set in a pan of hot water.
8. Bake at 325°F for 1 1/2 to 2 hours or until done.
9. Serve warm with hard sauce or cold with whipped cream.
